description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsDelectable red thong straps with a velvet hibiscus floral detail covering the strapBrownish beige footbedTPU outsole with a floral lug at the heel and branded grooves at the forefootMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
